semanticEvent.description: The video opens with a low-angle shot of a person standing in a room, with the words 'listening to Tyler, the Creator' overlaid on the screen.
A close-up shot of a surface covered in various small toys and objects, with a person's hand briefly entering the frame.
A wide shot shows a young man sitting on a rooftop, leaning out of a window with headphones on, looking upward.
A brief, black frame transition occurring between the rooftop scene and the final close-up.
An extreme close-up of a man's face, focusing on his closed eyes as he deeply listens to music.
A very brief flash of the face, capturing the end of the previous expression.
A frozen frame or near-instantaneous cut.
A micro-shot showing a flicker of visual data.
An extremely short segment showing a brief visual glitch or frame.
The final micro-segment before the video concludes.
